gene_region.label: IL1RL1 transcribed interval
gene_region.definition: Canonical IL1RL1 genomic interval on GRCh37 / hg19 from Ensembl GRCh37 lookup for ENSG00000115602 on the primary assembly, aligned to the hg19 coordinate system used by this app.

promoter_review_region.label: Operational promoter review window
promoter_review_region.definition: A practical 1 kb upstream window used by this app to flag promoter-adjacent coverage before the canonical gene interval begins.

promoter_hotspot_region.label: Promoter-associated CpG review window
promoter_hotspot_region.definition: Promoter-proximal CpG-focused span represented by the bundled EPIC subset and used here as the main methylation-review hotspot.

gene_context.gene_summary: IL1RL1 encodes the ST2 receptor chain for IL-33 and produces membrane and soluble isoforms that shape type 2 inflammation, mast-cell biology, eosinophilia, airway remodeling, and allergic immune tone.
gene_context.clinical_context: The bundled IL1RL1 knowledge base is focused on asthma, allergy, atopic dermatitis, airway inflammation, epithelial-barrier biology, and immune-regulatory research. Seeded markers and locus models are intended as research context and should not be promoted to diagnostic, prognostic, or treatment-selection claims without external clinical curation.
variant_effect_overview: IL1RL1 markers often sit in the broader 2q12 IL1 receptor gene cluster and can tag ST2 expression, soluble ST2 biology, eosinophil traits, asthma, or atopy context.
Variant interpretation should preserve IL1RL1, IL18R1, and IL18RAP cluster LD instead of assuming a single causal gene from one SNP.
condition_research_overview: IL-33/ST2 signaling and soluble ST2 biomarker research
gene_context.methylation_interpretation: IL1RL1 methylation should be read as local regulatory context around an allergic-inflammation gene. Promoter-proximal or gene-body beta values may help frame accessibility or expression hypotheses, but they are not validated stand-alone biomarkers for asthma, eczema, allergy, immune activation, or treatment response.
methylation_effects: Promoter-proximal methylation may suggest a more restrained or permissive local regulatory state for IL1RL1 expression potential.
Interpret methylation with tissue, cell composition, environmental exposure, disease state, medication history, and genotype context.
methylation_condition_research: Asthma, allergy, atopic dermatitis, eosinophilic inflammation, and airway epithelial studies.
Immune-cell, epithelial-barrier, cytokine-signaling, and inflammatory-disease epigenetic research.

evidence.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000115602: IL1RL1 coordinates and transcripts

variant_records.common_name: IL1RL1 asthma and type 2 inflammation locus marker
lookup_keys: IL1RL1 asthma and type 2 inflammation locus marker
variant_records.clinical_interpretation: rs3771180 is bundled as a IL1RL1 research marker for allergic disease, asthma, eczema, airway inflammation, or immune-regulatory cohort literature. Treat it as low-penetrance, cohort-aware association context rather than as a diagnostic or treatment-selection allele.
variant_records.clinical_significance: Research-level allergic and immune-inflammatory association marker; not a deterministic clinical allele.
functional_effects: May tag regulatory, expression, coding, haplotype, or linked-locus variation around IL1RL1.
Reported effects should be interpreted with ancestry, phenotype definition, tissue, and genotype dosage in mind.
associated_conditions: IL-33/ST2 signaling and soluble ST2 biomarker research
research_context: Use this marker as a research context flag and not as a stand-alone diagnosis.
Direction and effect size can vary across asthma, eczema, allergy, immune, epithelial, and ancestry-specific cohorts.
Confirm exact allele, build, zygosity, QC, and LD/haplotype context before drawing marker-level conclusions.
variant_records.usual_variant_note: IL1RL1 marker used for allergic-inflammation research context.
variant_records.methylation_interpretation: IL1RL1 methylation can provide local regulatory context, but it does not establish the variant, haplotype, expression state, or phenotype direction for rs3771180.

evidence.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000115602: IL1RL1 coordinates and transcripts

literature_findings.finding: The local curation treats rs3771180 as a research-grade IL1RL1 signal for allergic, airway, epithelial-barrier, or immune-inflammatory biology.
